condition.label: Consent review
condition.description: Surface when consent wording, recording choices, quotation consent or future-contact consent need review.

condition.label: Participant consent recording
condition.description: Surface when participant consent is recorded, reviewed or withdrawn before research participation.

condition.label: Study readiness
condition.description: Surface before a study moves from setup into participant sessions or fieldwork.

condition.label: Study readiness
condition.description: Surface before participant contact, recruitment or fieldwork begins.

condition.label: Study readiness
condition.description: Surface before sessions begin so method, participant risk and data handling rationale are visible.

condition.label: Study readiness
condition.description: Surface before sessions begin so the research setting is assessed against method, access, confidentiality and safety needs.

condition.label: Study readiness
condition.description: Surface before live sessions start so consent evidence is visible in the readiness decision.

condition.label: Session reminder automation
condition.description: Surface when a session workflow uses automated reminders or reusable participant message templates.

condition.label: Study close
condition.description: Surface when completed research needs a durable repository entry or publication record.

condition.label: Taxonomy change
condition.description: Surface when service-area taxonomy labels are created, changed, applied or excepted.

condition.label: Taxonomy change
condition.description: Surface when user-group taxonomy labels are created, changed, applied or excepted.

condition.label: Taxonomy change
condition.description: Surface when method taxonomy labels are created, changed, applied or excepted.

condition.label: Taxonomy change
condition.description: Surface when risk taxonomy labels are created, changed, applied or excepted.

condition.label: New research request
condition.description: Surface before commissioning, approving or scoping new research that may duplicate existing evidence.

condition.label: Access change
condition.description: Surface when access is requested, widened, changed or reviewed against role and research need.

condition.label: Permission model change
condition.description: Surface when role permissions or admin access are assigned, changed or reviewed.
